- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project – SubsControl web app (Next.js 16, Zustand, Zod, Sonner)
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project – TypeScript clean (npx tsc --noEmit)
- [x] Create and Run Task – .vscode/tasks.json z Dev Server, Build, TS Check
- [x] Launch the Project – http://localhost:3000 (serwer działa)
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete – README.md w web_app/

## Projekt: SubsControl

Aplikacja webowa do zarządzania subskrypcjami.

### Uruchomienie:
```bash
cd web_app
npm install
npm run dev
# http://localhost:3000
```

### Stos: Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Radix UI, Zustand, Zod, Sonner, React Hook Form, date-fns, Lucide React

### Kod: snake_case, "use client" tam gdzie potrzebne, persystencja w localStorage
